gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT] Brussels weather reports don't align. Meteoblue states a higher temperature range (20–25°C vs baseline's 7–14°C). YR.no and Météo Belgique didn't provide data. It seems like the bumblebees will enjoy a warmer day than expected, according to Meteoblue.
